---
name: User prefers terse responses with no trailing summaries
description: This user dislikes recap-at-end style; diff suffices
type: user
test_expected:
  classification: keep
---

User has said multiple times: don't write summary paragraphs at the end of responses. They can read the diff. Get to the point, keep updates tight, avoid headers-and-sections framing for simple answers.

Also prefers one-sentence end-of-turn summaries max.
